{% extends "!layout.html" %} {%- block extrahead %} {%- if pagename != 'index' and pagename != '404' and pagename != 'search' and pagename != 'genindex' and title is defined and title %} {#- Build a clean breadcrumb trail. - Drop trailing "index" segment — /notes/cpp/index.html is the C++ landing page, and labelling the tail crumb "Index" is meaningless to users. - Map known directory segments to display names (cpp → "C++", os → "OS", ...). - Use the actual page title for the final crumb. #} {%- set _seg_name = { 'notes': 'Notes', 'c': 'C', 'cpp': 'C++', 'cuda': 'CUDA', 'os': 'OS', 'tools': 'Tools', 'debug': 'Debugging', 'rust': 'Rust', 'blog': 'Blog', } %} {%- set _raw_parts = pagename.split('/') %} {%- set _trail = _raw_parts[:-1] if _raw_parts[-1] == 'index' else _raw_parts %} {%- endif %} {%- if tracking_id %} {% endif -%} {%- if pagename == '404' -%} {%- endif -%} {% endblock %}
